auth.loginPageDescription: Choose your preferred sign in method

home.title: Mind Elixir Cloud
home.subtitle: Free-flowing Thoughts, Ignite Creative Sparks - Anywhere, Anytime
home.intro: Mind Elixir Cloud brings the power of mind mapping to your browser. Access your ideas from anywhere, and share with others.

about.title: About Mind Elixir Cloud
about.subtitle: Free-flowing Thoughts, Ignite Creative Sparks - Anywhere, Anytime
about.intro: Mind Elixir Cloud brings the power of mind mapping to your browser. Access your ideas from anywhere, and share with others.

cloudSync.title: Cloud Synchronization
cloudSync.description: Access your mind maps from any device with automatic cloud sync. Your ideas are always at your fingertips.

webBased.title: Web-Based Access
webBased.description: No installation required. Create and edit mind maps directly in your browser with instant access.

publicSharing.title: Inspiration Sharing
publicSharing.description: Share your mind maps with the world. Join our gallery and inspire others with your ideas.

multiFormat.title: Multiple Export Formats
multiFormat.description: Export your mind maps to various formats for different use cases and platforms.

dataFlow.title: Diversified Data Flow
dataFlow.description: Seamlessly import from external tools like M10C and eBook converters, enriching your mind maps with diverse content sources.

comparison.title: Cloud vs Desktop
comparison.description: For maximum privacy and offline access, try Mind Elixir App. For sharing and cross-device access, use Mind Elixir Cloud.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.label: Label
profile.loginRequiredDesc: You need to login to access profile settings.

create.desktopRecommendation: We recommend using Mind Elixir App to create mind maps. You can share your mind maps to Cloud directly after creating them in the App.
